subject: Order status for a walnut cutting board
description: Hi, I ordered a walnut cutting board last week and wanted to check where it is in the queue — hoping to give it as a gift. Thanks!

subject: Question about the birdhouse kit
description: Is the birdhouse kit pre-drilled? Thinking of it as a weekend project with my grandson and want to make sure it's beginner-friendly.

subject: Shipping time to Ohio
description: How long would shipping take to Columbus, Ohio? Looking at the cornhole set and wondering if it would arrive before the holidays.

subject: Do you do custom engraving?
description: Do you offer custom engraving on the cutting boards? I'd like a last name added to one as an anniversary gift.

subject: Replacement part for a toy chest
description: The lid hinge on the toy chest I bought last year finally gave out. Any chance I can order a replacement hinge?

subject: Bulk order for a craft fair
description: I run a booth at a local craft fair and would love to order a dozen small cutting boards. Do you offer any bulk pricing?

subject: Wrong finish on my order
description: The cutting board I received came in a darker finish than what I ordered. Can we sort out getting the right one?

subject: Lead time on a cornhole set
description: What's the current lead time on a custom cornhole set? Hoping to have it for a family reunion in a few weeks.

subject: Gift wrapping option?
description: Do you offer gift wrapping? I'm ordering a cheese board for my mother-in-law and would love it to arrive ready to give.

subject: Return a duplicate item
description: I accidentally placed the same order twice and got two identical planter boxes. How do I go about returning one?

subject: Is the maple cutting board food-safe?
description: Is the finish on the maple cutting board food-safe? Want to make sure it's okay to use for prepping food.

subject: Do you ship to Canada?
description: Do you ship to Canada? I'm in Ontario and interested in the Adirondack chair, but not sure if you go across the border.
